#!/bin/bash

methods=\(
    "_attemptQuadrantShiftGrowth"
    "_attemptSpokeShiftGrowth"
    "_attemptRearrangeGrowth"
    "_attemptCenteredGrowth"
    "_blockShift"
    "_checkCardinalCompletion"
    "_checkIsPerimeter"

    "_expandInsideOut"
    "_fillHoles"
    "_handleDebugInput"

    "_maintainStructuralIntegrity"

    "_performAxisNudging"
    "_performBlockExpansion"
    "_performBlockMaintenance"
    "_performCardinalGrowth"
    "_performCenterBiasedGrowth"
    "_performHoleCleanup"
    "_pickLayerDirs"
    "_processIntents"
    "_seedStrips"
    "_shoveOtherLayers"
    "_spawnBlockCore"
    "_tickLayerDirs"
    "_tickStrips"
    "_updateAxisMaxDist"
    "_updateExpansionStatus"
    "_updateFillRatio"
    "_updateLayerMaxDist"
    "onExpansionComplete"
    "checkScreenEdge"
\)

for method in "${methods[@]}"; do
    count=$\(find /Users/enigma/Documents/MatrixCodeGenerator/MatrixCode_v8.5 -type f \\\( -name "*.js" -o -name "*.html" \\\) -exec grep -l "$method" {} \\; | wc -l\)
    usages=$\(find /Users/enigma/Documents/MatrixCodeGenerator/MatrixCode_v8.5 -type f \\\( -name "*.js" -o -name "*.html" \\\) -exec grep -c "$method" {} \\; 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}'\)
    echo "$method: $usages usages across $count files"
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/check_methods.sh
